message:
feat(tui): add layout and hit-test debug rendering modes for render_debug_view

Extends the render_debug_view() diagnostic API with two new debug rendering
modes accessible via "-layout" and "-hittest" view name suffixes:

Debug render infrastructure:
- Add DebugRenderKind enum (View, Layout, HitTest) to distinguish rendering modes
- Add parse_debug_render_target() that strips "-layout"/"-hittest" suffixes from
  view names, returning both the ViewMode and DebugRenderKind
- Refactor render_debug_view to dispatch on kind: View renders the frame buffer
  as before, Layout and HitTest produce structured text reports

Layout debug report (render_layout_debug_report):
- Computes and displays exact pixel coordinates for all layout regions: header,
  body, footer, and mode-specific panes (list, detail, timeline, middle, graph)
- Handles all ViewMode variants: Main/Insights/Board use 2-pane split,
  History uses 3–4 pane layout (Narrow/Standard/Wide), Graph uses single-pane
  or 2-pane depending on breakpoint
- Shows list panel cursor position, visible range, and scroll offset
- Reports detail panel content height and scroll metrics

Hit-test debug report (render_hittest_debug_report):
- Maps character coordinates to semantic regions using the same layout logic
- Tests key positions: corners, center, pane boundaries
- Useful for verifying mouse/click target resolution

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
